chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Revision Application No.56 of 2025 Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz ul Hassan Shah Applicant:- Ammad Shaoor through M/s. Shah Imroz Khan and Faizah, advocates. Respondent:- ANF Gulshan-e-Iqbal/The State through Mr. Habib Ahmed, Special Prosecutor ANF. Date of hearing:- 17.02.2026 =============== MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant claims to be owner of Suzuki Pick Up bearing Registration No.KF-1652 has challenged the impugned order rejecting his request for restoration of the said vehicle which was seized on 07.07.2018 by ANF and wherefrom 4.8 Kgs of Charas was recovered in presence of accused Muhammad Alam and Abdul Ghaffar who were arrested. 2. Applicant’s ground is that he is owner of the said Suzuki Pick Up and had rented it out for transportation of goods; in the investigation no evidence was found against him and he has no connection with the alleged offence. 3. Learned Special Prosecutor ANF has opposed this application. 4. Admittedly, applicant is not the accused and prima facie there is no material suggesting that he had any knowledge of his vehicle being used for transportation of narcotics. We therefore allow this application and restore possession of said vehicle to applicant on superdari on the condition that he should furnish surety in the sum of Rs.200,000/- in the trial Court with further direction that the said vehicle shall be produced in the trial as and when required. This order is tentative in nature, the trial Court would be competent to pass the final order in respect of the property including this vehicle in the judgment as required by law.

We therefore allow this application and restore possession of said vehicle to applicant on superdari on the condition that he should furnish surety in the sum of Rs.200,000/- in the trial Court with further direction that the said vehicle shall be produced in the trial as and when required. This order is tentative in nature, the trial Court would be competent to pass the final order in respect of the property including this vehicle in the judgment as required by law. The Criminal Revision Application is accordingly disposed of in above terms. JUDGE HANIF JUDGE
